pillars.name: Family
pillars.story: Add your personal family content here — a specific moment or detail lands better than a general statement about what family means to you.
pillars.shapeWork: Add one sentence on how your family shapes the way you work or what you're building toward.

pillars.name: Craft
pillars.story: I build software the way I want software to feel as a user: simple, fast, and frictionless, but still nice to look at. Every flow, button, color, API, and deployment decision starts from the same place — as a user, what would I expect right here? That question isn't a step in the process. It's the foundation everything else is built on.
pillars.shapeWork: Simplicity beats cleverness. If it needs a manual, it probably needs a redesign.

pillars.name: Play
pillars.story: Add your personal play content here — the things you do outside of work that feed back into how you think and build. Hockey, hobbies, gear, anything that keeps the creative side running.
pillars.shapeWork: Add one sentence on how what you do for fun shapes your work.
